cmd:
mkdir -p factory/specs; printf -- '---
id: 001
title: older
status: specd
---
body
' > factory/specs/001-older.md; printf -- '---
id: 002
title: newer
status: specd
---
body
' > factory/specs/002-newer.md; source "$PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/lib/tracker.sh"; CLAIMED=$(tracker_claim specd building build-loop); jq -n --arg claimed "$CLAIMED" --arg s1 "$(_tracker_field factory/specs/001-older.md status)" --arg s2 "$(_tracker_field factory/specs/002-newer.md status)" --arg actor "$(_tracker_field factory/specs/001-older.md claimed_by)" '{claimed: $claimed, s1: $s1, s2: $s2, actor: $actor}'
